description: AI and machine learning inference, image generation, and translation services

apis.name: HuggingFace Inference API
apis.free_tier: Free tier with rate limits, serverless inference on popular models

endpoints.desc: Run text generation inference on any hosted model
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"inputs":"What is machine learning?"}'

endpoints.desc: Generate text embeddings for semantic search
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"inputs":"How to build a web app"}'

endpoints.desc: Zero-shot text classification without fine-tuning
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/facebook/bart-large-mnli' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"inputs":"I love this product","parameters":{"candidate_labels":["positive","negative","neutral"]}}'

endpoints.desc: Transcribe audio to text using Whisper

apis.name: Replicate
apis.free_tier: Free credits on signup, pay-per-use after

endpoints.desc: Run a model prediction (async, returns prediction ID)
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api.replicate.com/v1/predictions' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $REPLICATE_API_TOKEN' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"version":"stability-ai/sdxl:latest","input":{"prompt":"a photo of an astronaut riding a horse"}}'

endpoints.desc: Check the status and output of a prediction
Get metadata about a specific model

apis.name: OpenAI
apis.free_tier: Free tier credits on signup, pay-as-you-go after

endpoints.desc: Generate chat completions with GPT models
Generate text embeddings for search and similarity
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api.openai.com/v1/embeddings' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"text-embedding-3-small","input":"The quick brown fox"}'

endpoints.desc: List all available models

apis.name: Stability AI
apis.free_tier: 25 free credits on signup

endpoints.desc: Generate images using Stable Diffusion 3
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api.stability.ai/v2beta/stable-image/generate/sd3' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $STABILITY_API_KEY' -F 'prompt=a beautiful sunset over mountains' -F 'output_format=png'

endpoints.desc: Upscale an image conservatively (preserving details)

apis.name: DeepL
apis.free_tier: 500,000 characters/month on free tier

endpoints.desc: Translate text between 30+ languages
Check current usage and character limits
List supported target languages

apis.name: LibreTranslate
apis.free_tier: No key required on public instances, rate limited

endpoints.desc: Translate text between supported languages
Detect the language of input text
List all supported languages and their codes

apis.name: Ollama
apis.free_tier: 100% free, runs locally. No API key needed

endpoints.desc: Generate text completion with a local model
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'http://localhost:11434/api/generate' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"llama3","prompt":"What is machine learning?","stream":false}'

endpoints.desc: Chat completion with message history
List all locally available models
Generate embeddings from a local model
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'http://localhost:11434/api/embeddings' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"nomic-embed-text","prompt":"The quick brown fox"}'

apis.name: OpenRouter
apis.free_tier: Free models available (meta-llama, mistral, gemma). No credit card required

endpoints.desc: Chat completion across 100+ models via unified OpenAI-compatible API
List all available models with pricing and context length

apis.name: Groq
apis.free_tier: Free tier with generous rate limits, ultra-fast LPU inference

endpoints.desc: Chat completion with Llama, Mixtral, and Gemma models at high speed
List available models on Groq

apis.name: Together AI
apis.free_tier: Free tier with $5 credit on signup, open source model hosting

endpoints.desc: Chat completion with open source models (Llama, Mistral, etc.)
Generate embeddings with open source embedding models
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api.together.xyz/v1/embeddings' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $TOGETHER_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"togethercomputer/m2-bert-80M-8k-retrieval","input":"The quick brown fox"}'

endpoints.desc: Generate images with open source diffusion models
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api.together.xyz/v1/images/generations' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $TOGETHER_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0","prompt":"a cat in space"}'

apis.name: ElevenLabs
apis.free_tier: 10,000 characters/month on free tier, 3 custom voices

endpoints.desc: Convert text to natural-sounding speech audio
List all available voices including custom ones

apis.name: AssemblyAI
apis.free_tier: Free tier with 100 hours of transcription

endpoints.desc: Submit audio for transcription (async, returns transcript ID)
Get transcription result by ID

apis.name: Deepgram
apis.free_tier: $200 free credit on signup, speech-to-text and text-to-speech

endpoints.desc: Transcribe audio with Nova-2 model and smart formatting
Convert text to speech with Aura voices
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api.deepgram.com/v1/speak?model=aura-asteria-en' -H 'Authorization: Token $DEEPGRAM_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text":"Hello world"}' --output speech.mp3

apis.name: Clarifai
apis.free_tier: Free tier with 1,000 operations/month for image and video recognition

endpoints.desc: Run image recognition or classification on an image URL

apis.name: Roboflow
apis.free_tier: Free tier with 1,000 inferences/month, computer vision models

endpoints.desc: Run object detection or classification on an image

apis.name: OCR.space
apis.free_tier: Free tier with 25,000 requests/month, OCR for images and PDFs

endpoints.desc: Extract text from an image URL or uploaded file
OCR a PDF document to extract text

apis.name: LanguageTool
apis.free_tier: No key required for basic usage, 20 requests/minute. Premium key optional

endpoints.desc: Check text for grammar, spelling, and style errors
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'https://api.languagetool.org/v2/check' -d 'text=This are a example of bad grammer.&language=en-US'

endpoints.desc: List all supported languages for grammar checking

apis.name: MyMemory Translation
apis.free_tier: No key required, 5,000 chars/day anonymous. Email registration for 50,000/day

endpoints.desc: Translate text between language pairs

apis.name: Datamuse
apis.free_tier: No key required, 100,000 requests/day. Word-finding and language query engine

endpoints.desc: Find words with similar meaning (reverse dictionary)
Find synonyms of a word
Find words that rhyme with a given word
Autocomplete suggestions for a word prefix

apis.name: Text-Processing.com
apis.free_tier: No key required, 1,000 calls/day. Sentiment analysis and NLP

endpoints.desc: Analyze sentiment of text (positive, negative, neutral with probabilities)
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'http://text-processing.com/api/sentiment/' -d 'text=I love this product, it is amazing!'

endpoints.desc: Part-of-speech tagging for text
endpoints.example: curl -X POST 'http://text-processing.com/api/tag/' -d 'text=The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog'

apis.name: Wolfram Alpha
apis.free_tier: Free tier with 2,000 queries/month for Short Answers API

endpoints.desc: Full computational answer with multiple result pods
Short plain-text answer to a computational question

apis.name: VoiceRSS
apis.free_tier: Free tier with 350 requests/day, text-to-speech in 50+ languages

endpoints.desc: Convert text to speech audio file
